title: LEGO Star Wars 75423 SMART Play: Luke's Red Five X-Wing - All-in-One Interactive Toy Set incl. SMART Brick, 5 Tags, 2 Minifigures & Charger - Gift Idea for 6+ Year Old Boys, Girls & Adult Fans
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: INTERACTIVE STAR WARS BUILDING TOY – This LEGO SMART Play All-in-One set features one SMART Brick with its charger, 5 SMART Tags and 2 SMART Minifigures that power up immersive play, reacting to your every move
THE GALAXY PLAYS BACK - When connected to the X-wing's SMART Tag, the SMART Brick responds to motion and colours with lights and sounds, activating laser-shooting, refuelling, and repair functions
2 LEGO SMART MINIFIGURES – The SMART Brick brings SMART Pilot Luke Skywalker, SMART Princess Leia, and an R2-D2 figure with a SMART Tag to life by revealing their unique voices and reactions
SCREEN-FREE PLAYTIME – Join friends and family to recreate epic battle scenes by using the SMART Tags for the Imperial turret, transporter or command centre: endless role play awaits
STAR WARS GIFT FOR KIDS – Treat a fan to this responsive building toy, which makes an out-of-this-world birthday gift idea for 6+ year old boys and girls, as well as teenage or adult collectors

LEGO SMART ASSIST APP – Get started, troubleshoot, control sound levels, download updates or activate a built-in microphone for potential future features (its activation will require both your permission and a firmware update)

SMART BRICK FEATURES – Offers 45 minutes of battery life per charge and is compatible with other SMART Play sets for expanded adventures (please note, the SMART Brick is not available to purchase as a stand-alone product)
description: From the manufacturer Interactive building toy The galaxy plays back Bring Luke Skywalker’s daring X-wing adventures to life with responsive sounds and lights, powered by LEGO SMART Play. This All-In-One Set offers your young Jedi and their friends hours of screen-free action play. Previous page Reacts to the way you move Kids experience realistic engine sounds as they launch the X-wing building toy and swoosh it in different directions. Repair the X-wing Use the hammer to trigger hammering noises. Fun role play Role-play as a Rebel crew member helping to prepare the X-wing for the next mission. SMART Play battles Add the SMART Play: Darth Vader’s TIE Fighter set (75421, sold separately) and relive classic Star Wars battles with dynamic sounds and lights. Next page Previous page SMART Brick The brains of the operation, responding to different movements, colours and more. SMART Brick charger The charger generates approx. 45 minutes of SMART Play action per charge. 2 LEGO SMART Minifigures Bring the LEGO SMART Minifigures to life via the SMART Brick and hear his instant reactions to different situations. 5 SMART Tags SMART Tags activate the SMART Brick, which responds to how kids move and play. Next page The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. The video shows the product being unpacked.
